steps.title: Learn the Basics
steps.description: Language fundamentals, time/space complexity, and the hashing intuition every other step rides on.

topics.title: Language Fundamentals
topics.description: Variables, control flow, I/O, functions, and arrays in C++, Java, JavaScript, and Python.

topics.title: Time and Space Complexity
topics.description: Big-O notation, common growth classes, how to reason about loops, recursion, and amortized costs.

topics.title: Hashing
topics.description: Hash maps, hash sets, frequency counting, the classic two-sum pattern.

steps.title: Sorting Techniques
steps.description: Build every classic sort from scratch. Then understand why we use the built-in sort for almost everything else.

topics.title: Elementary Sorts
topics.description: Selection, bubble, insertion. Quadratic but instructive.

topics.title: Efficient Sorts
topics.description: Merge sort, quick sort. The recursive sorts that get you to O(n log n).

steps.title: Arrays
steps.description: The most important data structure. Master the patterns here and binary search, two pointer, sliding window all click later.

topics.title: Arrays — Easy
topics.description: Linear scans, two-pass tricks, basic counting. The warmup problems.

topics.title: Arrays — Medium
topics.description: Kadane, Dutch national flag, majority element, set matrix zeroes, rotations.

topics.title: Arrays — Hard
topics.description: Merge intervals, count inversions, median of two sorted arrays, reverse pairs.

steps.title: Binary Search
steps.description: Binary search isn't just for sorted arrays. Learn to recognize the monotonic predicate and you'll see binary search everywhere.

topics.title: Binary Search on 1D Arrays
topics.description: Classic lower bound, upper bound, first and last occurrence, rotated arrays.

topics.title: Binary Search on the Answer
topics.description: Search over a range of possible answers. Aggressive cows, koko eating bananas, painter's partition.

topics.title: Binary Search on 2D Matrices
topics.description: Row-column elimination, treating a matrix as a flattened sorted array.

steps.title: Strings — Basic and Medium
steps.description: Character manipulation, palindromes, anagrams. The classic warmup before advanced string algorithms.

topics.title: String Basics
topics.description: Reverse, palindrome check, anagram check, longest common prefix.

topics.title: String Medium
topics.description: Roman to integer, group anagrams, longest substring without repeating, sort by frequency.

steps.title: Linked Lists
steps.description: Pointer manipulation that carries over to trees, graphs, allocators, parsers. Master the dummy node + two pointer patterns.

topics.title: Singly Linked List
topics.description: Build the data structure. Insertions, deletions, reversal, the most asked DSA topic in interviews.

topics.title: Doubly Linked List
topics.description: Prev + next pointers. The data structure behind LRU caches and browser history.

topics.title: Linked List Medium
topics.description: Floyd's cycle detection, merge two sorted, remove nth from end, palindrome check, intersection.

topics.title: Linked List Hard
topics.description: Reverse in k-groups, copy list with random pointer, sort, flatten a multilevel list.

steps.title: Recursion
steps.description: Pattern by pattern. Once you internalize parametrized recursion, backtracking and dynamic programming both stop being scary.

topics.title: Recursion Basics
topics.description: Print 1 to N, factorial, sum of N, recursion tree intuition.

topics.title: Subsequences and Subsets
topics.description: Power set, subsequences with sum K, count subsequences, the take-or-skip pattern.

topics.title: Backtracking
topics.description: N-queens, sudoku solver, rat in a maze, word break, palindrome partitioning.

steps.title: Bit Manipulation
steps.description: Bitwise tricks that turn O(n) lookups into O(1) and unlock subset enumeration, parity, XOR.

topics.title: Bit Basics
topics.description: AND, OR, XOR, shift, set/clear/toggle the i-th bit.

topics.title: Bit Tricks
topics.description: Count set bits, single non-repeating, XOR of range, power of two, n divisors.

steps.title: Stacks and Queues
steps.description: LIFO and FIFO. Plus the monotonic stack and deque, two of the most reused patterns in competitive programming.

topics.title: Stack and Queue Basics
topics.description: Implementations using arrays and linked lists. Stack from queues, queue from stacks.

topics.title: Monotonic Stack
topics.description: Next greater element, daily temperatures, largest rectangle in histogram, sum of subarray minimums.

topics.title: Monotonic Deque
topics.description: Sliding window maximum, the classic monotonic deque pattern.

steps.title: Sliding Window and Two Pointer
steps.description: Whenever you see 'longest subarray with property X', this is your tool. Internalize the expand-shrink template.

topics.title: Two Pointer
topics.description: Pair sum on a sorted array, three sum, remove duplicates, container with most water.

topics.title: Sliding Window
topics.description: Longest substring without repeating, max consecutive ones, minimum window substring, fruits into baskets.

steps.title: Heaps and Priority Queues
steps.description: The data structure of choice for top-K problems, streaming medians, and Dijkstra's algorithm.

topics.title: Heap Basics
topics.description: Heapify, sift up, sift down, build heap in O(n), implement a priority queue from scratch.

topics.title: Top-K Problems
topics.description: K largest elements, K closest points to origin, K-th smallest in a sorted matrix, top K frequent.

topics.title: Streaming Median and Merge
topics.description: Two-heap median, merge K sorted lists, the two-heap pattern.

steps.title: Greedy Algorithms
steps.description: When local optimal choices give the global optimum. Learn the standard problems and the proof patterns.

topics.title: Greedy Basics
topics.description: Assign cookies, lemonade change, valid parenthesis after replacements.

topics.title: Scheduling and Intervals
topics.description: N meetings in one room, minimum platforms, job sequencing for max profit.

topics.title: Classic Greedy
topics.description: Fractional knapsack, jump game I and II, candy distribution, minimum coins.

steps.title: Binary Trees
steps.description: Traversals, structural problems, the most-asked tree patterns. Recursion on trees is the easiest place to internalize tree DP.

topics.title: Traversals
topics.description: Preorder, inorder, postorder (recursive and iterative). Level order BFS. Morris traversal.

topics.title: Structural Problems
topics.description: Height, diameter, balanced check, identical trees, symmetric trees, max path sum.

topics.title: Construction and Views
topics.description: Build a tree from traversals, top/bottom/left/right views, vertical order traversal.

topics.title: Lowest Common Ancestor
topics.description: LCA in a binary tree, LCA in a BST, k-th ancestor with binary lifting.

steps.title: Binary Search Trees
steps.description: BST invariant, search/insert/delete, and the inorder traversal trick that makes a lot of BST problems easy.

topics.title: Operations on a BST
topics.description: Search, insert, delete, ceiling, floor, k-th smallest, validate BST.

topics.title: BST Medium and Hard
topics.description: Recover a BST, merge two BSTs, pair sum in a BST, BST iterator with O(h) memory.

steps.title: Graphs
steps.description: Traversals, shortest paths, MST, topological sort. The most varied chapter in DSA.

topics.title: Representation
topics.description: Adjacency list vs matrix, directed vs undirected, edge list, when to use each.

topics.title: BFS and DFS
topics.description: Traversal templates, connected components, cycle detection, bipartite check.

topics.title: Topological Sort
topics.description: Kahn's algorithm and DFS-based, course schedule, alien dictionary.

topics.title: Shortest Paths
topics.description: Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford, Floyd-Warshall, 0/1 BFS, shortest path in DAG.

topics.title: Minimum Spanning Tree
topics.description: Prim's and Kruskal's. Why MSTs matter and how to spot them in problem statements.

topics.title: Disjoint Set Union
topics.description: Union by rank, path compression, the data structure that makes Kruskal's fast and unlocks Number of Islands II.

topics.title: Tarjan, Bridges, Articulation Points
topics.description: Strongly connected components, bridges in a graph, articulation points. Disc/low time intuition.

steps.title: Dynamic Programming
steps.description: DP by pattern. Once you can spot which standard pattern a problem maps to, DP stops feeling magical.

topics.title: 1D DP
topics.description: Fibonacci, climbing stairs, frog jump, max sum of non-adjacent, house robber.

topics.title: DP on Grids
topics.description: Unique paths, min path sum, triangle, chocolate pickup.

topics.title: DP on Subsequences
topics.description: Subset sum, partition, target sum, count subsets, the take-or-skip pattern with memoization.

topics.title: Knapsack Patterns
topics.description: 0/1 knapsack, unbounded knapsack, coin change I and II, rod cutting.

topics.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
topics.description: O(n^2) DP, O(n log n) binary search variant, printing the LIS, longest divisible subset.

topics.title: DP on Strings
topics.description: Longest common subsequence, edit distance, shortest common supersequence, wildcard matching.

topics.title: DP on Stocks
topics.description: All six stock problems with one unified state machine.

topics.title: Partition DP
topics.description: Matrix chain multiplication, palindrome partitioning, burst balloons, boolean evaluation.

topics.title: DP on Trees
topics.description: Tree diameter via DP, max path sum, house robber on a tree, rerooting technique.

steps.title: Tries
steps.description: Prefix tree data structure. Used for autocomplete, longest common prefix, max XOR pair, word search II.

topics.title: Trie Basics
topics.description: Insert, search, starts-with. Build the data structure from scratch.

topics.title: Trie Applications
topics.description: Max XOR of two numbers, count distinct substrings, word search II.

steps.title: Strings — Advanced
steps.description: Failure function, suffix arrays, hashing. The string algorithms that show up in hard interviews and competitive programming.

topics.title: KMP
topics.description: Knuth-Morris-Pratt failure function. Substring matching in O(n + m).

topics.title: Z Algorithm
topics.description: Z-function. Pattern matching, string period detection.

topics.title: String Hashing
topics.description: Rabin-Karp, polynomial hashing, double hashing to defeat anti-hash tests.

topics.title: Manacher's Algorithm
topics.description: Longest palindromic substring in O(n).

steps.title: Math Foundations
steps.description: The number theory you actually need: GCD, LCM, primes, modular arithmetic, combinatorics. Topics Striver underweights but interviews ask for.

topics.title: Number Theory Basics
topics.description: GCD by Euclid's algorithm, LCM, sieve of Eratosthenes, prime factorization.

topics.title: Modular Arithmetic
topics.description: Modular addition, multiplication, inverse via Fermat's little theorem, fast exponentiation.

topics.title: Combinatorics
topics.description: nCr mod p, Pascal's triangle, stars and bars, basic counting.

steps.title: Segment Trees and Fenwick Trees
steps.description: Range query data structures. Striver barely touches these; for competitive programming and FAANG-tier interviews they're table stakes.

topics.title: Segment Tree Basics
topics.description: Build, point update, range query. Sum, min, max segment trees.

topics.title: Segment Tree with Lazy Propagation
topics.description: Range updates with lazy propagation. The pattern that turns O(n*q) into O((n+q) log n).

topics.title: Fenwick Tree (BIT)
topics.description: Binary indexed tree, prefix sums in O(log n), counting inversions in O(n log n).

steps.title: Data Structure Design
steps.description: LRU cache, LFU cache, time-based key-value, snapshot array. The 'design X' problems that combine multiple DSAs.

topics.title: LRU Cache
topics.description: Hash map + doubly linked list. The most-asked design problem in interviews.

topics.title: LFU Cache
topics.description: Frequency tracking with O(1) operations. Hash map + nested doubly linked list.

topics.title: Other Design Problems
topics.description: Time-based key-value store, snapshot array, randomized set, design Twitter.
